identity.mission: Create a top 1% fitness app design that breaks category conventions. Fusion over imitation. Emotion first.
principles: Fusion over Imitation: Mix athletic precision with lifestyle warmth.
Emotion First: Every pixel must convey 'Energy' and 'Progress'.
Content is King: Directed storytelling, not just data dumps.
Zoom In: Bold focus on essential metrics.
Negative Space: 2-3x more spacing than typical apps.
Contrast: High contrast for readability and impact.
anti_patterns: Inter font everywhere (Use Barlow Condensed for Headings).

heading.usage: Hero titles, Section headers, Big stats

rules: Line height: 'leading-none' for headers, 'leading-relaxed' for body.

colors.theme_strategy: The Performance Pro (Dark Mode Primary, Light Mode Toggle)
usage_rules: Use 'Volt Blue' for primary actions and trust signals.
Use 'Electric Blaze' sparingly for high-intensity alerts or 'Burn' metrics.
Never use pure black (#000000) for backgrounds; use Obsidian (#0A0A0A).
Ensure text contrast meets APCA standards.

spacing_system.rule: Use 2-3x more spacing than typical designs. Containers with borders must have internal padding (p-6 or p-8).

marketing.name: The Tetris Grid (Mode A)
marketing.rules: Asymmetry is key. Never fill 100% of the grid perfectly. Leave breathing room.

dashboard.name: High Density Grid (Mode B)
dashboard.rules: Every pixel utilized. Use h-full on children. No jagged bottoms.

alignment.optical: Add extra padding to visually center text blocks next to round icons.

components.strategy: Hybrid (Custom HTML for Marketing, Shadcn for App)

styles.buttons: Sharp edges or Pill-shaped. No default rounded-md.
styles.cards: Flat background, 1px subtle border, no shadow by default. Hover: Slight lift + shadow.
styles.inputs: Shadcn Input, customized to match brand colors.

special_elements.tracing_beam: Use for pricing or feature highlights. Glowing gradient line moving around the border.
special_elements.marquee: Use 'react-fast-marquee' for 'Kinetic Texture' (large outline text in background).
special_elements.glassmorphism: Use for sticky headers and floating navs. High blur, subtle border.

images.description: Night track, moody, high contrast. Use with overlay for Hero section.
Action shot of badminton player. Use for Sport Selection card.
People doing bodyweight exercises at home. Use for 'Hobby/Fitness' purpose card.
Boy running, dynamic. Use for 'Athletics' sport card.

assets.icons_instruction: Use Lucide React icons. For sports specific icons not in Lucide, use text labels or generic activity icons.

universal_guidelines: Do not use generic centered layouts.
Create depth through layered design elements (z-index).
Use glass-morphism effects with backdrop filters (12-24px blur).
Every interaction needs micro-animations (hover, focus, active).
instructions_to_main_agent: 1. Install dependencies: 'npm install framer-motion lucide-react clsx tailwind-merge sonner react-fast-marquee'.
2. Update 'tailwind.config.js' with the 'Performance Pro' colors and 'Barlow Condensed' font family.
3. Create a 'Layout' component that handles the sticky header (Glassmorphism) and footer.
4. Build the 'Landing Page' using the 'Tetris Grid' and 'Hero' image provided.
5. Build the 'Onboarding Flow' using Shadcn forms, but styled with the 'Performance Pro' theme.
6. Build the 'Dashboard' using the 'High Density Grid' and Bento-style widgets.
7. Ensure all text is legible and contrast ratios are met.
8. Use the provided image URLs for the respective sections.
